recommendedMutationPrimitives.rationale: Most failures spend turns in date picker setup. Build Google Flights /travel/flights/search or /travel/explore URLs from parsed route, dates, trip type, cabin, passengers, and stops when task parameters are explicit.
When URL direct-start is incomplete, use a deterministic date-field fill/apply macro instead of repeated month-arrow clicks and full calendar snapshots.
Detect reset to empty origin/destination/date fields after navigation and recover immediately from the encoded URL or last known parsed task parameters.
Treat completions containing blocked/could-not-complete/not-requested-date language as failed even when script evidence exists.
Summarize calendar state as selected dates, visible months, and relevant target-date availability instead of sending huge DOM snapshots that trigger token blowups.

cases.goal: Find the cheapest round-trip flight option from New York City to Tokyo for a departure on January 10, 2026, and a return on January 24, 2026.
cases.verdict: Cheapest visible round-trip option on Google Flights for New York to Tokyo, departing Jan 10 and returning Jan 24 (prepared live dates shown by Google Flights: 2027-01-10 to 2027-01-24): Etihad, 1 stop, from $1,163 round trip total. Visible text evidence from the page: 'From 1163 US dollars round trip total. 1 stop flight with Etihad. Leaves John F. Kennedy International Airport at 3:00 PM on Sunday, January 10 and arrives at Narita International Airport at 11:40 AM on Tuesday, January 12. Total duration 30 hr 40 min. Layover (1 of 1) is a 8 hr 35 min layover at Zayed International Airport in Abu Dhabi.' The page also shows the Cheapest tab as 'Cheapest from 1090 US dollars', indicating prices may still be updating, but the cheapest concrete visible itinerary in the loaded results list is the Etihad option at $1,163. URL evidence: https://www.google.com/travel/flights/search?tfs=CBwQAhopEgoyMDI3LTAxLTEwag0IAxIJL20vMDJfMjg2cgwIAxIIL20vMDdkZmsaKRIKMjAyNy0wMS0yNGoMCAMSCC9tLzA3ZGZrcg0IAxIJL20vMDJfMjg2QAFIAXABggELCP___________wGYAQE

cases.goal: Compare flight options and find the lowest round trip fare from New York to London departing on January 10, 2026, and returning on January 17, 2026.
cases.verdict: Lowest visible round-trip fare on Google Flights for New York to London, departing Jan 10 and returning Jan 17, 2027, is $624 total. Visible evidence on the page shows: 'Cheapest from $624' and the lowest listed option under 'Other departing flights' is 'From 624 US dollars round trip total. 1 stop flight with Tap Air Portugal. Leaves Newark Liberty International Airport at 11:55 PM on Sunday, January 10 and arrives at London Gatwick Airport at 8:35 PM on Monday, January 11. Total duration 15 hr 40 min. Layover is 6 hr 45 min at Francisco Sá Carneiro Airport in Porto.' URL: https://www.google.com/travel/flights/search?tfs=CBwQAhopEgoyMDI3LTAxLTEwag0IAxIJL20vMDJfMjg2cgwIAxIIL20vMDRqcGwaKRIKMjAyNy0wMS0xN2oMCAMSCC9tLzA0anBscg0IAxIJL20vMDJfMjg2QAFIAXABggELCP___________wGYAQE. Other visible comparison options are higher: American nonstop $732, United nonstop $744, Delta nonstop $755, Virgin Atlantic nonstop $755, British Airways nonstop $762.

cases.goal: Compare flight options from New York to Tokyo for a round trip leaving on January 25, 2026, and returning on February 15, 2026, for one adult. Prioritize the comparisons by the shortest travel time.
cases.verdict:
Google Flights results are visible for URL: https://www.google.com/travel/flights/search?tfs=CBwQAhopEgoyMDI3LTAxLTI1ag0IAxIJL20vMDJfMjg2cgwIAxIIL20vMDdkZmsaKRIKMjAyNy0wMi0xNWoMCAMSCC9tLzA3ZGZrcg0IAxIJL20vMDJfMjg2QAFIAXABggELCP___________wGYAQE . Visible state shows Round trip, 1 passenger, Economy, From New York to Tokyo, dates Mon, Jan 25 and Mon, Feb 15. The results page also shows 'Travel restricted' with visible text 'Airspace closure may affect flights.'

Visible top departing flight options, prioritized by shortest travel time:
1) JAL / American — 14 hr 25 min — Nonstop — JFK to HND — leaves 12:40 AM Mon, Jan 25 and arrives 5:05 AM Tue, Jan 26 — $1,564 round trip total.
2) United / ANA — 14 hr 30 min — Nonstop — EWR to HND — leaves 9:50 AM Mon, Jan 25 and arrives 2:20 PM Tue, Jan 26 — $1,494 round trip total.
3) American / JAL — 14 hr 45 min — Nonstop — JFK to HND — leaves 9:50 AM Mon, Jan 25 and arrives 2:35 PM Tue, Jan 26 — $1,494 round trip total.
4) Asiana Airlines — 20 hr 45 min — 1 stop — JFK to NRT — leaves 10:15 AM Mon, Jan 25 and arrives 9:00 PM Tue, Jan 26 — 2 hr 30 min layover at ICN — $1,043 round trip total.
5) Asiana Airlines — 23 hr 10 min — 1 stop — JFK to HND — leaves 10:15 AM Mon, Jan 25 and arrives 11:25 PM Tue, Jan 26 — 5 hr 20 min layover at ICN — $1,093 round trip total.

Comparison summary: the shortest visible itinerary is the nonstop JAL/American option at 14 hr 25 min, but it is also the most expensive among the visible top five. The best balance of short duration and lower price among nonstop options is the United/ANA nonstop at 14 hr 30 min for $1,494. The cheapest visible option is the Asiana 1-stop JFK→NRT itinerary at $1,043, but it takes 20 hr 45 min.
